title: The Melt is Watched
description: Rotation 7's dead-drop at the Melt was supposed to be clear. It wasn't. There's a new Syndicate watcher, and the Weaver's message is still sitting behind panel J-14.
gm_instructions: If the player doesn't retrieve the crystal by Cycle 848, the Syndicate takes it. If they fight the watcher, the Garrison investigates the noise. Suggest using a distraction or a bribe.

title: Whispers of the Black-Flag
description: A classified hull is being built in Dockyard Primus. The Weaver wants to know its registry code, but the Blue Navigators have locked down the manifest.
gm_instructions: The player must either slice the Signal Splice (needs a Green), bribe Enna the Pink in the Gyre, or steal a Blue's credential. The ship is the 'Acheron', a BoQC stealth frigate.

title: Ryanna's Ghost
description: Someone matching the description of a burned operative (Mira of Ganymede) was spotted in Cryssos Block. The Weaver wants her located but not approached.
gm_instructions: Mira is Ryanna. She has set traps in her sector. If the player approaches without passing her 3-question test, she will vanish again and trigger a Garrison alert as a distraction.
